## Quick Start

```go
import sdk "github.com/mountos-io/mountos-admin-sdk/go"

client, err := sdk.NewClient(sdk.Config{
    BaseURL:    "https://appserv.example.com",
    PrivateKey: "<base64 ED25519 key>",
})
```

## Response Envelope

SDK methods return the unwrapped `data` payload as a typed value plus `error` (set on `status="failure"` or transport failure).

```go
type StandardResponse[T any] struct {
    Status    string `json:"status"`
    Message   string `json:"message"`
    Data      T      `json:"data,omitempty"`
    ErrorCode int    `json:"errorCode,omitempty"`
}

type PaginatedResponse[T any] struct {
    Items      []T            `json:"items"`
    Pagination PaginationMeta `json:"pagination"`
}

type CursorResponse[T any] struct {
    Items      []T    `json:"items"`
    NextCursor *int64 `json:"nextCursor"`
}
```

| 10201 | VALIDATION_FAILED |

| 10901 | SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE |
| 10902 | DATABASE_ERROR |
